title: thevetia peruviana
intro: Thevetia peruviana, also known as Yellow Cassia, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Thevetia peruviana include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain infections. Herbal preparations of Thevetia peruviana can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
